text: How many unread WhatsApp messages are sitting there right now like a moral failure?
How many screenshots are currently in your camera roll 'for later'?
How many apps do you have installed on your phone right now?
How many browser tabs do you have open right now?
How many alarms live in your phone for a life you do not actually live?
How many WhatsApp groups are you part of?
How many contacts do you have saved in your phone?
How many hours of sleep did you get last night?
How many OTT shows are on your watchlist right now?
How many subscriptions are quietly stealing money from you every month?
How many times did you check your phone in the last hour?
How many unread emails are in your inbox right now?
How many group chats are muted on your phone right now?
How many food delivery orders have you placed this month?
How many photos did you take this week that nobody will ever see?
How many times have you said 'I'll do it tomorrow' this week?
How many people could call you at 2 AM and you'd actually answer?
How many people could ruin your mood with one notification?
How many times have you cancelled plans in the last month?
How many people could show up at your door tonight and you'd let them in without warning?
How many days could you stay off Instagram or WhatsApp before you started itching?
How many times have you been late somewhere in the last two weeks?
How many people do you stay in touch with mostly because history is heavy?
How many WhatsApp messages do you send on an average day?
How many passwords do you actually have memorised (not saved)?
How many times have you hit snooze this week total?
How many people in your life could say, with confidence, 'I know what they're really like'?
How many people did you speak to on a call yesterday?
How many times have you ghosted someone in the last 6 months?
How many minutes can you sit alone with your thoughts before reaching for a screen?
How many minutes does it take you to fall asleep at night?
How many licks do you think it takes to finish a Magnum ice cream?
How many times have you rewatched the same TV show from start to finish?
How many steps is it from your bed to your bathroom?
How many items of clothing are currently starring in the hit series called 'The Chair'?
How many photos have you taken of your food this month?
How many times have you googled your own name?
How many half-drunk water bottles are active in your life right now?
How many useless objects are on your bedside table right now?
How many bags, boxes, or packages are currently waiting to be 'dealt with later'?
How many times have you ordered the same thing from the same restaurant?
How many times have you watched the same reel twice because you forgot why it was funny?
How many days could you survive without your phone before having a breakdown?
How many people would come to your birthday party if you threw one tomorrow?
How many hours a day do you think you spend doing absolutely nothing productive?
How many drinks would knock you out tonight?
How many times have you lied to a close friend in the last month?
How many exes do you still have saved in your phone?
How many times have you cried in the last month?
How many times have you stalked someone's Instagram without following them?
How many people are in your phone under names that would require explanation?
How many hours did you spend on your phone yesterday — honestly?
How many times have you talked about someone behind their back this week?
How many times have you regretted something you said in the last week?
How many contacts would you panic to see calling if your phone were screen-shared on a TV?
How many people do you genuinely dislike right now?
How many times did you check who viewed your story the last time you posted?
How many times did you zoom into your own face before posting your last photo?
How many times have you said '5 minutes away' while still fully indoors?
How many times have you typed a dangerous text and then remembered dignity at the last second?
How many Slack/Teams messages are waiting for your reply right now?
How many times did you say 'makes sense' in meetings today?
How many cups of tea or coffee do you drink on a workday?
How many browser tabs do you have open during a typical workday?
How many reminders does it take to survive your average workday?
How many times this week did you say 'let's sync'?
How many minutes before a meeting do you usually open the doc, if at all?
How many hours do you spend in meetings on an average week?
How many minutes into a meeting do you usually know it could have been an email?
How many work emails do you send on a typical day?
How many times have you worked past 8pm this month?
How many leaves do you have remaining this year?
How many sticky notes or reminders do you have on your desk right now?
How many people at work could correctly explain what you are working on right now?
How many minutes early or late do you usually log in?
How many meetings this week should legally have been a message?
How many times have you been on a call but secretly multitasked?
How many times this month did you say 'sounds good' when it sounded terrible?
How many actual minutes of progress happen in your average 60-minute meeting?
How many times have you turned your camera off during a video call this month?
How many times have you pretended to be busy to avoid a colleague?
How many times have you ignored a Slack message and hoped it went away?
How many times have you checked LinkedIn this week?
How many times this month have you said 'I'll do this after the weekend' and didn't?
How many hours per week disappear into finding context somebody could have written down?
How many times have you looked at job listings in the last month?
How many times have you used 'per my last email' in the last month?
How many messages did you rewrite this week just to sound less annoyed?
How many times have you sent a message to the wrong chat this month?
How many slides in your last deck existed mainly so it looked like work happened?
